result:
The cleaned dataset has been successfully created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 records containing the NSID identifier and the consolidated language variable (lang). The data was processed as follows:

1. All 4 wave files were loaded from data/input/ using read_delim with tab delimiter
2. Files were merged using full_join by NSID
3. Missing value codes were harmonized according to the metadata mappings:
   - -999, -998, -997, -995, -94 → -2 (Schedule not applicable)
   - -99 → -3 (Not asked/interview not conducted)
   - -92 → -9 (Refusal)
   - -91 → -1 (Item not applicable)
   - -1 → -8 (Don't know/insufficient information)
   - Null values → -3
4. Wave-specific variables were created (lang_S1, lang_S2, lang_S3, lang_S4)
5. A consolidated language variable (lang) was created using earliest valid positive value prioritization
6. Output includes only NSID and the consolidated lang variable
